# saas-dev

> Enterprise SaaS scaffolding skills for Django + React/Next.js — 107 reference files, 5 specialist skills, Superpowers-style autonomous pipeline.

## What is saas-dev?

saas-dev is a Claude Code skills marketplace plugin that packages production-grade Django + React SaaS patterns as agent skills. It covers the enterprise baseline (audit logs, 2FA, multi-tenancy, feature flags, full-text search, webhooks, encryption, structured logging, Prometheus metrics, distributed tracing, database pooling, Kubernetes deployment, GDPR compliance) plus a Superpowers-style brainstorm → plan → execute pipeline for autonomous feature development.

## Install

- Claude Code: `/plugin marketplace add Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna/claude-skills`
- Antigravity / Cursor / Codex / Gemini CLI: `git clone` then copy `plugins/saas-dev/skills/saas-dev` to your tool's skills directory

## Repository

- URL: https://github.com/Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna/claude-skills
- Version: 4.0.0
- License: MIT

## Specialist Skills

- **django-project-setup**: New project scaffolding with 8 Phase 0 architecture questions, CLAUDE.md v2 generation, initial settings
- **django-backend-dev**: DRF Generics, BaseModel, AuditMixin, SoftDeleteMixin, dual FK serializers, FilteredListSerializer, audit log, multi-tenancy, feature flags, Postgres FTS, Elasticsearch, field encryption, GDPR
- **django-auth-dev**: Pattern C multi-user auth (StaffUser + CustomerUser), 2FA via django-otp, JWT per user type, RBAC, token revocation
- **django-integrations-dev**: Stripe, S3 uploads, email, webhooks (JWT-signed), PDF (WeasyPrint + ReportLab), Celery, Redis
- **django-devops-dev**: Docker, GitHub Actions, structlog, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, Sentry Performance, PgBouncer, blue/green deployment, Kubernetes rolling deployment

## Autonomous Pipeline Skills

- **using-saas-dev**: Bootstrap skill — loads at session start, auto-wires brainstorm → plan → execute
- **saas-dev-brainstorm**: Socratic design discussion before writing code, saves spec to saas-dev-spec.md
- **saas-dev-plan**: Breaks approved spec into 2–5 min tasks with exact file paths and verification steps
- **saas-dev-execute**: Dispatches fresh subagent per task, two-stage review gate, writes progress to saas-dev-progress.md

## CLAUDE.md v2

saas-dev introduces a structured CLAUDE.md v2 format with 9 sections: schema_version, project_metadata, skill_version_used, dependency_registry, environment_variables, third_party_integrations, architecture_decisions (ADR-lite), known_issues, recent_changes.

## Compatible Tools

Claude Code, Google Antigravity, Cursor, OpenAI Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Amp, Kiro, Windsurf — uses the open Agent Skills standard (agentskill.sh).

## Author

Ayithamsetty Vamsi Krishna — https://github.com/Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna

## Topics / Keywords
